creator: snb@threerings.net
text:
Would it be possible to get the affected versions updated for  
Bugzilla now? http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/ 
f8d3689e-6770-11dc-8be8-02e0185f8d72.html is still listing all  
versions as vulnerable, but 3.0.2 should not be and has been in the  
ports tree for awhile now.
